assertions.issues: Blocked by missing NEXT_PUBLIC InsForge env vars and inability to authenticate/use library UI.

frictions.description: Runtime error overlay appears immediately with a persistent loading screen, preventing interaction with auth and protected-page flows.

blockers.description: Missing required frontend env vars in running app: NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL and/or NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried navigation across all assigned routes, cleared and rechecked errors, reloaded login route with query param, and captured network/error logs. Block persisted.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions; all 7 are blocked by missing NEXT_PUBLIC InsForge environment variables causing runtime errors and preventing interactive flow validation.
